name: OSI Systems, Inc.
description: OSI Systems, Inc. is a vertically integrated designer and manufacturer of specialized electronic systems and components for critical applications in homeland security, healthcare, defense, and aerospace. The company operates through three primary business segments: Security, which provides screening solutions; Healthcare, which focuses on patient monitoring and diagnostic systems; and Optoelectronics and Manufacturing, which develops advanced optical sensors and custom electronic components. Headquartered in Hawthorne, California, OSI Systems serves a global customer base by delivering innovative technology solutions designed to enhance safety, security, and medical connectivity in complex environments.
